summary: Large ty/toy.c matching PR. The author described bringing toy.c to 52/70 matched functions, typing and renaming the light-object loader to Toy_LoadLObjList, updating call sites, and verifying with ninja progress and diff_changes.py. Bot progress reported +0.23% matched code, 13 new matches in main/melee/ty/toy, 18 unmatched-item improvements, and one .sdata regression.

key_files.role: Primary matching work: added/reworked many toy functions, expanded local structs and fields, added includes, recovered Toy_LoadLObjList body/signature, adjusted loops/control flow/stack tactics.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: toy.c includes added db/db.h, lb_00CE.h, lb_00F9.h, mn/mnmain.h, dolphin/gx.h
diff_excerpt: ToyListEntry, TyDisplayData, TyLightData, TyLightFile, Toy26B8, Toy6E68, TyUnk25 fields expanded
diff_excerpt: un_80305058 added; Trophy_SetUnlockState marked 100% match; un_803067BC rewritten with src/dest loop
grep: Toy_LoadLObjList definition at diff around line 888

key_files.role: Header/prototype updates for toy declarations, including Toy_LoadLObjList signature and exported data declarations.
evidence_refs: grep: /* 306EEC */ HSD_LObj* un_80306EEC(void*, s32) changed to HSD_LObj* Toy_LoadLObjList(LightList**, s32*)

key_files.role: Symbol rename for recovered light-object loader at .text:0x80306EEC.
Callsite update from un_80306EEC to Toy_LoadLObjList.
evidence_refs: grep: lobj = un_80306EEC(lightData, 0) changed to Toy_LoadLObjList(lightData, 0)

key_files.role: Callsite update from un_80306EEC to Toy_LoadLObjList.
Callsite update from un_80306EEC to Toy_LoadLObjList.

what_changed.text: Renamed un_80306EEC to Toy_LoadLObjList in symbols.txt, toy.h, toy.c, and ty call sites.
evidence_refs: grep: toy.h prototype changed to Toy_LoadLObjList(LightList**, s32*)
grep: tydisplay.c, tyfigupon.c, tylist.c callsites updated

what_changed.text: Recovered or improved many toy.c functions. Bot report lists 13 new 100% matches including un_80311AB0_OnEnter, un_8030FA50, un_80311960, un_80311788, un_80312050, un_80310660, Trophy_SetUnlockState, un_803063D4, un_80305918, un_80308250, un_80307BA0, un_803084A0, and un_80308F04.
Improved 18 still-unmatched toy items, including large progress for fn_8030B530, fn_80309404, fn_8030E110, un_80310B48, un_803087F4, un_8030FE48, and un_80305058.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: decomp-dev[bot] report, 18 improvements in unmatched items

what_changed.text: Expanded local type information for toy/trophy/list/light data structures, replacing some anonymous padding and raw pointer access with named fields.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: ToyListEntry, TyDisplayData, TyLightData, TyLightFile, Toy26B8, Toy6E68, TyUnk25 expansions
diff_excerpt: un_80305918 changed raw offset access to ((Toy26B8*) base)->x19C

what_changed.text: Added includes needed by the recovered code and moved PosArray/PosArrayFull ownership to toy.h per an inline comment.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: added db/db.h, lb_00CE.h, lb_00F9.h, mn/mnmain.h, dolphin/gx.h
diff_excerpt: comment says PosArray, PosArrayFull defined in toy.h; TrophyData in types.h

smart_moves.text: The rename of the light-object loader was propagated across symbol metadata, the owning header, the implementation, and known ty call sites instead of being kept as a local alias.
Some generated-looking unrolled or temp-heavy code was rewritten into clearer pointer/loop forms, notably un_803067BC.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: un_803067BC replaced var_rXX temporaries and unrolled chunks with src/base/dest/count and a for loop

smart_moves.text: Recovered structs allowed clearer field accesses for known offsets, for example Toy26B8 x19C in un_80305918.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Toy26B8 gained x19A, x19C, trophy_flags, selectedIdx, selectedTrophyId, trophy_count

decomp_lessons.lesson: When a function's role becomes supported, rename it consistently through symbols, the owning header, the definition, and call sites. This PR's Toy_LoadLObjList rename is grounded by the PR body and by updates in symbols.txt, toy.h, toy.c, tydisplay.c, tyfigupon.c, and tylist.c.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: typing/renaming the light-object loader as Toy_LoadLObjList with updated call sites

decomp_lessons.lesson: Recovering local structs can convert offset traffic into reviewable field access and support matching work, but partial fields remain provisional when names are still xNN/pad_NN.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Toy26B8, TyDisplayData, TyLightData, TyLightFile, Toy6E68 field expansions
diff_excerpt: un_80305918 changed base[0xCE]/raw pointer write to Toy26B8->x19C

decomp_lessons.lesson: Natural loop reconstruction can improve readability over generated unrolled blocks when the repeated access pattern is regular.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: un_803067BC removed an 8-at-a-time unrolled copy pattern and used a countdown for loop over src and dest

naming_conventions.name: Toy_LoadLObjList
naming_conventions.meaning: Recovered name for .text:0x80306EEC light-object list loader.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: typing/renaming the light-object loader as Toy_LoadLObjList

naming_conventions.name: ToyListEntry
naming_conventions.meaning: List node with prev/next, archive_name, symbol_name, trophy_id, and archive fields.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: typedef struct ToyListEntry with prev, next, archive_name, symbol_name, trophy_id, archive

naming_conventions.name: TyLightSymbolEntry / TyLightIndexEntry / TyLightFile
naming_conventions.meaning: Typed light-file structures introduced around Toy_LoadLObjList/light loading.

naming_conventions.name: selectedIdx, selected_entry, visible_count, trophy_flags, selectedTrophyId, trophy_count
naming_conventions.meaning: Semantic or semi-semantic fields added to display/trophy structs; remaining xNN/pad_NN names preserve uncertainty.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: TyDisplayData and Toy26B8 field expansions

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Stack-shape steering remained in some matched/improved functions using PAD_STACK and an UNUSED local array.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: un_80305B88 changed PAD_STACK(4) to PAD_STACK(8)
diff_excerpt: Trophy_SetUnlockState changed PAD_STACK(8) to UNUSED u8 state_pad[8]; u16 state[3]
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Loaded standards require explicit verifier evidence for such tactics. The PR body claims ninja progress and diff_changes.py, and bot output reports progress, but the slice does not include narrow objdiff details for each tactic.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Preserved M2C_FIELD at some accesses while other offsets were typed, indicating partial type recovery rather than complete cleanup.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: un_80305058 uses M2C_FIELD(flags, u16*, byte_off)
diff_excerpt: un_803067BC writes M2C_FIELD(un_804D6EDC, s16*, offset)
diff_excerpt: un_80306954 changed raw state offset to M2C_FIELD(state, s32*, 0x10)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: Do not generalize this as preferred style; global standards treat M2C_FIELD as bridge code while recovering fields.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Introduced temporary local state storage to shape Trophy_SetUnlockState while reaching a reported 100% match.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: local variables oldCount, stateFlag, UNUSED state_pad[8], u16 state[3]
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: The slice supports that this was used in the PR, but not that it is broadly reusable outside this function.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Replaced an unrolled reverse copy with a normal countdown for loop in un_803067BC.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: un_803067BC removed var_rXX/unrolled block and added for (i = count; i != 0; i--) { *dest-- = *src; src += 3; }
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caution: This aligns with the natural-loops standard, but the function remained an unmatched-item improvement in the bot report rather than a listed 100% new match.

review_feedback.author: decomp-dev[bot]
review_feedback.text: GALE01 report showed matched code 66.98% (+0.23%, +8928 bytes), 13 new matches, 18 improvements in unmatched items, and one unmatched-item regression for main/melee/ty/toy .sdata (-5 bytes, 68.38% to 60.00%).
No review comments or human review records were present in the loaded slice.

evidence_refs: metadata_json: PR identity, state, changed files, counts
raw_diff/diff_excerpt: representative toy.c, symbols, header, and callsite edits
text_corpus: bot progress report with exact match/improvement/regression tables
metadata_json: no review comments or reviews
notes: The raw diff is truncated in loaded_files and the PR is very large, so not every changed hunk was inspected.

The author claimed verification with ninja progress and diff_changes.py; the bot report supports progress numerically, but the slice does not contain full command logs or per-function objdiff evidence.
No human review comments were available, so reviewer intent and requested changes cannot be inferred.
Some code still uses PAD_STACK, UNUSED padding, M2C_FIELD, and xNN/pad_NN names; these are recorded as PR tactics or provisional typing, not promoted as global preferred style.
The bot reported one .sdata regression; the slice does not explain whether it was accepted as a tradeoff.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Evidence-backed function rename should be propagated through symbols, header, implementation, and call sites
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2487 renamed un_80306EEC to Toy_LoadLObjList and updated config/GALE01/symbols.txt, src/melee/ty/toy.h, src/melee/ty/toy.c, and call sites in tydisplay.c, tyfigupon.c, and tylist.c. The PR body explicitly describes typing/renaming the light-object loader and updating call sites.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Use recovered local structs to replace raw offsets where evidence supports fields
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2487 expanded several toy-local structs and used Toy26B8->x19C in un_80305918 instead of raw offset/pointer access. Remaining xNN and pad_NN fields show uncertainty was preserved where semantics were not fully known.
evidence_refs: diff_excerpt: Toy26B8 and related struct expansions

accepted_candidate_records.title: Try natural loops for generated-looking repeated copy blocks
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2487 rewrote un_803067BC from temp-heavy/unrolled copy code into src/dest/count loop forms. This is a concrete ty/toy example aligned with the natural-loops standard.

source_update_candidates.title: ty/toy owns Toy_LoadLObjList at 0x80306EEC
source_update_candidates.text: In PR #2487, un_80306EEC at .text:0x80306EEC was renamed to Toy_LoadLObjList. The recovered prototype in src/melee/ty/toy.h is HSD_LObj* Toy_LoadLObjList(LightList**, s32*), and call sites in ty display/list/figupon code were updated.
source_update_candidates.reason: Possible path/symbol fact for curator review; supported by PR body and diff, but should be checked against current source before promotion.

source_update_candidates.title: PR #2487 made broad matching progress in main/melee/ty/toy
source_update_candidates.text: Bot report for PR #2487 says main/melee/ty/toy gained 13 new matches and 18 unmatched-item improvements, with matched code 66.98% (+0.23%, +8928 bytes).
source_update_candidates.reason: Useful historical progress/path context; bot output is strong for the PR slice but should not be treated as current progress without checking current reports.

rejection_notes: Do not promote PAD_STACK, UNUSED padding arrays, or M2C_FIELD uses from this PR as accepted general style; standards require narrow verifier evidence and prefer typed fields when recoverable.
Do not infer that the .sdata regression was intentional or acceptable; the bot reported it, but the slice contains no discussion explaining it.
Do not infer human reviewer guidance; the loaded slice has no human review comments.
Do not treat all new xNN/pad_NN fields as semantically final names; many preserve incomplete type knowledge.
